ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the loan was approved */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the loan was approved */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the loan */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan (in months) */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank that approved the loan */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the loan was approved */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the loan was approved */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code where the loan was approved */,
  "create_job" INTEGER /* Number of jobs created by the loan */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the time of loan approval */,
  "real_estate" TEXT /* Whether the loan is secured by real estate */,
  "rev_line_cr" TEXT /* Whether the loan has a revolving line of credit */,
  "urban_rural" TEXT /* Whether the loan is in an urban or rural area */,
  "default" INTEGER /* Whether the loan is in default */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the loan */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry the loan belongs to */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES loan_industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_type" TEXT /* Type of bank (e.g., commercial, SBA) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the bank */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the bank */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate for the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_defaults" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan default */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that defaulted */,
  "default_date" TEXT /* Date the loan defaulted */,
  "default_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the loan default */,
  "amount_defaulted" INTEGER /* Amount defaulted by the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_defaults_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that was paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the loan payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" INTEGER /* Amount paid for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan applicant */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan applied for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the loan applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applicants_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_collaterals" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan collateral */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that has the collateral */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., real estate, vehicle) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_collaterals_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_guarantors" (
  "guarantor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan guarantor */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that has the guarantor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan guarantor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan guarantor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan guarantor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the loan guarantor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guarantor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_guarantors_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the loan officer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_officers_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan disbursement */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that was disbursed */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "amount_disbursed" INTEGER /* Amount disbursed for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_disbursements_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
